name: Tanzid Tamim
bio: Met during freshman orientation at university. We used to pull all-nighters together before exams. She's now a software engineer in Toronto.

name: Saif Hasan
bio: Grew up on the same street. We played football every weekend as kids. Still meet up whenever I'm back home. He coaches youth basketball now.

name: Tamim Iqbal
bio: My first manager at the agency. She taught me everything about UX research. Left to start her own design consultancy in Barcelona last year.

name: Mahmudullah Riad
bio: My college roommate for two years. We backpacked through Southeast Asia after graduation. He's doing his PhD in environmental science in Nairobi.

name: Virat Kohli
bio: We met at a local book club three years ago and instantly bonded over our love of Murakami. We grab coffee almost every week and keep each other sane.

name: Sakib Al Hasan
bio: Co-founder I met at a hackathon in 2019. We built a food delivery app prototype together that weekend. He's now leading a fintech startup in Seoul.

name: Ben Stroks
bio: Our families have known each other for over a decade. She's a freelance illustrator whose work has been featured in The New Yorker. Inspires me creatively.

name: Babar Azam
bio: Met at the gym about four years ago. We push each other hard during workouts and decompress on weekend hikes. One of the most grounded people I know.
